baseline.reason: Correctly identifies CWE-476 and the sink (det_ctx->p->flow at line 1322), but incorrectly attributes the source (det_ctx->p=NULL at line 2699) to DetectRulePacketRules instead of DetectRunTx. The trigger path is vague and confused about whether the dereference occurs in a loop iteration or across packets, missing the precise inter-packet timing between packet-level inspection (line 2783) and transaction-level inspection (line 2830).

vastdb.reason: Accurately identifies CWE-476 null pointer dereference, correctly locates both the source (det_ctx->p=NULL in DetectRunTx at line 2699) and sink (det_ctx->p->flow in DetectEntropyDoMatch at line 1322), and correctly traces the inter-packet trigger path where packet-level inspection (DetectRulePacketRules at line 2783) runs before DetectRunTx re-assigns det_ctx->p (line 2398), leaving it NULL from the previous packet. The fix adds a Flow* parameter with NULL check and no longer dereferences det_ctx->p.
